input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.1.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.1.7
            TITLE: roll hoop bracing supports

            CONTENT:
            rule F.1.7: Roll Hoop Bracing Supports
F.1.7 Roll Hoop Bracing Supports 
The structure from the lower end of the Roll Hoop Bracing back to the Roll Hoop(s).

final_answer: The structure from the lower end of the Roll Hoop Bracing back to the Roll Hoop(s).
